nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the way of Jeroboam and in his sin which he made Israel sin.

esv.text: He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord  and walked in the way of Jeroboam and in his sin which he made Israel to sin.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，行耶羅波安的路，犯了耶羅波安使以色列人陷在罪中的那罪。

ccb.text: 他步耶罗波安的后尘，做耶和华视为恶的事，使以色列人陷入罪中。
